name: Denise Richards and Her Wild Things
original_name: Denise Richards and Her Wild Things
overview: Hollywood icon and The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills alum Denise Richards is trying to balance it all as she navigates being an actress, wife and mother in the public eye.
